Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Sprays / Sprays

Sprays

Overview

As of May 26th 2026, there are 1,126[1] Sprays In-Game
“
Express yourself!
”
— In-Game Description

Sprays are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 4. They can be used in Battle Royale, Save the World, Creative and Fortnite Festival.

Additional features available for Sprays

Additional features available for Sprays[]
Animated
  • Luxe was the first animated Spray.
